ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project range */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Financial goal range of the projects (e.g., Less than 1000) */,
  "number_successful" INTEGER /* Number of successful projects in the range */,
  "number_failed" INTEGER /* Number of failed projects in the range */,
  "number_canceled" INTEGER /* Number of canceled projects in the range */,
  "total_projects" INTEGER /* Total number of projects in the range */,
  "percentage_successful" REAL /* Percentage of successful projects */,
  "percentage_failed" REAL /* Percentage of failed projects */,
  "percentage_canceled" REAL /* Percentage of canceled projects */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project range */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project range */,
  "average_project_duration" REAL /* Average duration of projects in the range */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of projects in the range */,
  "average_revenue" REAL /* Average revenue generated by projects in the range */,
  "average_profit_margin" REAL /* Average profit margin of projects in the range */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager responsible for the projects in this range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Financial goal range of the projects */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the metric (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "project_range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project range it pertains to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance metric period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance metric period */,
  "average_project_duration" REAL /* Average duration of projects in the metric period */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of projects in the metric period */,
  "average_revenue" REAL /* Average revenue generated by projects in the metric period */,
  "average_profit_margin" REAL /* Average profit margin of projects in the metric period */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager responsible for the projects in this metric period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_project_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_range_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project summary entry */,
  "total_successful" INTEGER /* Total number of successful projects across all ranges */,
  "total_failed" INTEGER /* Total number of failed projects across all ranges */,
  "total_canceled" INTEGER /* Total number of canceled projects across all ranges */,
  "total_projects" INTEGER /* Total number of projects across all ranges */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the summary period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the summary period */,
  "average_project_duration" REAL /* Average duration of all projects */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of all projects */,
  "average_revenue" REAL /* Average revenue generated by all projects */,
  "average_profit_margin" REAL /* Average profit margin of all projects */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager responsible for the projects in the summary period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_summary_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the project manager belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_details" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project range */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the project */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the project */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the project */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (successful, failed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_details_project_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_range_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_details_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)
